title: Sealapack Large Resealable, Reuseable Food Bags, Pack Of 15 Bags 25 X 30 cm
features: AIRTIGHT SEAL FOR MAXIMUM FRESHNESS: The press-seal closure locks in freshness and keeps food from spoiling. Perfect for marinating meat, freezing fruits, or storing chopped veggies in the fridge. These airtight freezer bags will keep your food as fresh as the day you bought it.

VERSATILE FOOD STORAGE: Sealapack food bags are perfect for storing everything from leftovers to snacks and even non-food items. Whether you're organising the fridge or prepping meals for the freezer, these resealable bags will keep your food fresh for longer.

REUSABLE & ECO-FRIENDLY: Reduce waste and save money with these reusable plastic bags. Wash and reuse them again and again, whether you're storing food, organising your fridge freezer, or packing a sandwich for lunch. These household essentials are both practical and planet-friendly!

TWO CONVENIENT SIZES: Choose between a 15-pack of larger bags (10 x 12 inches) or a 40-pack of smaller bags (7 x 8 inches), giving you the flexibility to store everything from large meals to small snacks. You’ll always have the right size for any food storage task.

STRONG & DURABLE: Made from high-quality, tough plastic, these food bags can withstand freezing temperatures and are designed to last. Whether storing food in the fridge freezer or packing for a picnic, they can handle the weight and keep your food safe.
description: Product Description Sealapack Reusable Food and Freezer Bags are a must-have for any kitchen! Whether you’re prepping meals in advance, storing leftovers, or simply trying to organise your fridge and freezer, these versatile food bags make life so much easier. Made from durable, high-quality plastic, they are perfect for everything from freezing fruits and vegetables to marinating meat. With two convenient sizes available – a 15-pack of larger 10 x 12 inch bags or a 40-pack of smaller 7 x 8 inch bags – these bags are designed to suit all your food storage needs. The airtight, resealable press-seal keeps food fresh and prevents spills, making them great for use at home or even on the go. Plus, they’re reusable, helping you save money while reducing waste! Use them as fridge organisers to separate your food, freeze individual portions for easy meal prep, or keep your sandwiches fresh for work or school. The options are endless! These fridge freezer bags aren’t just for food storage; they’re also perfect as travel bags for toiletries, makeup, or any small items. Strong and versatile, these household essentials will soon become your go-to for food storage, keeping everything neat and tidy! Manufacturer Contact Information Sealapack Food Bags (10x12) Roll 15 pack
